fields.about:
I'm a Django developer. A Django developer is a software engineer who specializes in using the Django web framework to build robust, secure, and scalable web applications, primarily using the Python programming language. 
The Django Framework
Django is a high-level, open-source Python web framework that encourages rapid development and clean, pragmatic design. It follows the Model-View-Template (MVT) architectural pattern and provides many built-in features, often referred to as a "batteries-included" approach.

A cell phone is a portable electronic device used for communication through voice calls, text messages, and internet access. It incorporates various technologies, such as computing, programming, and the internet, to enable wireless communication and access to a wide range of applications and services.

A mobile phone or cell phone is a portable wireless telephone that allows users to make and receive calls over a radio frequency link while moving within a designated telephone service area, unlike fixed-location phones (landline phones).

is a cosmetic coating applied to fingernails or toenails for decoration and protection, made from a blend of organic polymers, colorants, and other ingredients that create various colors and textures, serving as a popular element in manicures and pedicures for personal expression and style
